header.description: Message an assistant or GPT, analyze images, generate audio, etc.

deleteAssistant.description: Delete an assistant from the account

list.description: Returns a list of files that belong to the user's organization

message.description: Create a completion with GPT 3, 4, etc.

generate.description: Creates an image from a text prompt

translate.description: Translates audio into text in English

deleteFile.description: Delete a file from the server

upload.description: Upload a file that can be used across various endpoints

analyze.description: Take in images and answer questions about them

classify.description: Check whether content complies with usage policies

name.description: The name of the assistant. The maximum length is 256 characters.

description.description: The description of the assistant. The maximum length is 512 characters.

instructions.description: The system instructions that the assistant uses. The maximum length is 32768 characters.

codeInterpreter.description: Whether to enable the code interpreter that allows the assistants to write and run Python code in a sandboxed execution environment, find more here

knowledgeRetrieval.description: Whether to augments the assistant with knowledge from outside its model, such as proprietary product information or documents, find more here

file_ids.description: The files to be used by the assistant, there can be a maximum of 20 files attached to the assistant

noticeTools.displayName: Connect your own custom n8n tools to this node on the canvas

temperature.description: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive. We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.

topP.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered. We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.

failIfExists.description: Whether to fail an operation if the assistant with the same name already exists

baseURL.description: Override the default base URL for the API

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries to attempt

timeout.description: Maximum amount of time a request is allowed to take in milliseconds

preserveOriginalTools.description: Whether to preserve the original tools of the assistant after the execution of this node, otherwise the tools will be replaced with the connected tools, if any, default is true

codeInterpreter.description: Whether to enable the code interpreter that allows the assistants to write and run Python code in a sandboxed execution environment, find more here

description.description: The description of the assistant. The maximum length is 512 characters.

file_ids.description: The files to be used by the assistant, there can be a maximum of 20 files attached to the assistant. You can use expression to pass file IDs as an array or comma-separated string.

instructions.description: The system instructions that the assistant uses. The maximum length is 32768 characters.

knowledgeRetrieval.description: Whether to augments the assistant with knowledge from outside its model, such as proprietary product information or documents, find more here

name.description: The name of the assistant. The maximum length is 256 characters.

removeCustomTools.description: Whether to remove all custom tools (functions) from the assistant

language.description: The language of the input audio. Supplying the input language in ISO-639-1 format will improve accuracy and latency.

purpose.description: Only return files with the given purpose

n.description: How many completions to generate for each prompt. Note: Because this parameter generates many completions, it can quickly consume your token quota. Use carefully and ensure that you have reasonable settings for max_tokens and stop.

dalleQuality.description: The quality of the image that will be generated, HD creates images with finer details and greater consistency across the image

quality.description: The quality of the image that will be generated, High creates images with finer details and greater consistency across the image

vivid.description: Lean towards generating hyper-real and dramatic images

returnImageUrls.description: Whether to return image URL(s) instead of binary file(s)

auto.description: Model will look at the image input size and decide if it should use the low or high setting

low.description: Return faster responses and consume fewer tokens

high.description: Return more detailed responses, consumes more tokens

maxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion. Most models have a context length of 2048 tokens (except for the newest models, which support 32,768).

useStableModel.description: Whether to use the stable version of the model instead of the latest version, accuracy may be slightly lower

frequency_penalty.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim

presence_penalty.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics

reasoning_effort.description: Controls the amount of reasoning tokens to use. A value of "low" will favor speed and economical token usage, "high" will favor more complete reasoning at the cost of more tokens generated and slower responses.

low.description: Favors speed and economical token usage

medium.description: Balance between speed and reasoning accuracy

high.description: Favors more complete reasoning at the cost of more tokens generated and slower responses

maxToolsIterations.description: The maximum number of tool iteration cycles the LLM will run before stopping. A single iteration can contain multiple tool calls. Set to 0 for no limit.

assistantId.description: Assistant to respond to the message. You can add, modify or remove assistants in the playground.

auto.description: Looks for an input field called 'chatInput' that is coming from a directly connected Chat Trigger

guardrails.description: Looks for an input field called 'guardrailsInput' that is coming from a directly connected Guardrails Node

define.description: Use an expression to reference data in previous nodes or enter static text

prompt.description: A text description of the desired image(s). The maximum length is 1000 characters for dall-e-2 and 4000 characters for dall-e-3.
prompt.placeholder: e.g. A cute cat eating a dinosaur

connector.description: Connect one of the supported memory nodes

threadId.description: Specify the ID of the thread to continue
The ID of the thread to continue, a new thread will be created if not specified

simplify.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fileSizeLimitNotice.displayName: OpenAI API limits the size of the audio file to 25 MB

model.description: The model to use for image generation

input.description: The input text to classify if it is violates the moderation policy

voice.description: The voice to use when generating the audio

binaryPropertyName.description: Name of the binary property which contains the image(s)

imageUrls.description: URL(s) of the image(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

content.description: The content of the message to be send
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

role.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

user.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

assistant.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

system.description: Usually used to set the model's behavior or context for the next user message

content.description: The content of the message to be send
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

role.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

user.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

assistant.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

system.description: Usually used to set the model's behavior or context for the next user message

jsonOutput.description: Whether to attempt to return the response in JSON format. Compatible with GPT-4 Turbo and all GPT-3.5 Turbo models newer than gpt-3.5-turbo-1106.
